title: ما هو القلق؟
citation: Clark, D.M., & Beck, A.T. (2010). Cognitive therapy of anxiety disorders: Science and practice. Guilford Press.
content: [CONTENT AUTHOR REQUIRED] Gulf Arabic adaptation (~350 words, Khaleeji register). Cover: القلق as natural alarm response, somatic vocabulary first (قلبي يدق، ضيقة، ثقل), three dimensions (cognitive/physical/behavioural), anxiety as spectrum not binary. Validate before labelling.
